$comment: Tracked Claude Code session config. Wires the signal-loop CANDIDATE (harness/sandbox/) to fire on every prompt: session-feedback runs the orchestrator loop (extract -> classify -> estimate -> route -> outcome) and prints the trace back into the session, so you can watch a command pass through the nodes. It is the SOLE writer of record/signals.jsonl (sole-writer rule). FAIL-OPEN: it never blocks a turn. A wired candidate is still a candidate (governance/rules/harness-admission.md) - not admitted to the harness. Hooks load at session start, so the live trace begins next session. (signal-ledger remains a candidate for reference; it is NOT wired here, to keep one writer per stream.)
